typography.body: Montserrat (Regular/SemiBold/Light) - ALWAYS for body, sub-headings, lists, index, tables

fixed_rules.color_consistency: Use #071B24 (Azul Noite) for Canva body text and #FFBFB2 (Rosa Doce) for Canva pink accents/CTAs. Web defaults to CSS values (#0F1B2A and #FF8FB0 respectively).
never_do: Never rewrite or typecast JOHNNY'S logo - always use assets/logo PNGs
Never inject body text into the checklist shape background (element PB4Ps7lNFWl48M2x-LB8BNwD8PhDRVyCV) on Slide 43 - keep it set to ' '
Never change fonts to arbitrary ones; always stick to Montserrat and Roboto-Condensed-Black
Never flatten texts or render titles as images

image_generation_rules.character_drinks: Para cada personagem gerado ou planejado no prompt de imagem, questione obrigatoriamente o usuário qual bebida ele estará segurando antes de formular o prompt consolidado.

state.current_phase: FASE 1 — ANÁLISE ARQUITETURAL CONCLUÍDA. Grafo de conhecimento gerado.
blockers: Aguardando transcrição bruta para processamento do roteiro
completed_tasks: DESIGN.md preenchido com dados reais de Johnny's by Anthonia
